title: Father of a Palestinian woman killed with three others during a missile attack expresses shock.
summary_full: The victims are the first Palestinians in the Israeli-occupied West Bank to be killed as a result of the Middle East war.
summary_public: The victims are the first Palestinians in the Israeli-occupied West Bank to be killed as a result of the Middle East war.
